name: Decebal Dobrica
tagline: Rust Systems & Agentic AI · Author of AllSource & AllFrame
metaDescription: Rust and AI engineer. Author of AllSource (embedded Rust event store) and AllFrame (Rust framework). Founder of Wolven Tech, building event-sourced systems, agentic LLM workflows, and AI-accelerated delivery. 15+ years across fintech, identity, SaaS, and Web3.

professional.title: Rust Systems & Agentic AI
specialties: Agentic AI & LLM Workflows (Vercel AI SDK, RAG, tool-use)

achievements.description: Shipped 1M+ lines of production Rust across four event-sourced platforms — cutting memory 6–10× and infrastructure cost up to 75%
